name: aurora-field
title: Aurora Field
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Field wrapper for labels, descriptions, required markers, disabled state, and validation errors.
docs:
Aurora Field installs with its declared Aurora registry dependencies.

Install `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-label` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/field.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-label`.
